---
title: "Demographic history and genetic structure in pre-Hispanic Central Mexico"
date: 2023-05-12
author:  ["Viridiana Villa-Islas", "Alan Izarraras-Gomez", "Maximilian Larena", "Elizabeth Mejía Perez Campos", "Marcela Sandoval-Velasco", "Juan Esteban Rodríguez-Rodríguez", "Miriam Bravo-Lopez", "Barbara Moguel", "Rosa Fregel", "Ernesto Garfias-Morales", "Jazeps Medina Tretmanis", "David Alberto Velázquez-Ramírez", "Alberto Herrera-Muñóz", "Karla Sandoval", " Maria A. Nieves-Colón", "Gabriela Zepeda García Moreno", "Fernando A. Villanea", "Eugenia Fernández Villanueva Medina", "Ramiro Aguayo-Haro", " Alexander G. Ioannidis", "Andrés Moreno-Estrada", "Flora Jay", "J. Víctor Moreno-Mayar", "Federico Sánchez Quinto", "María C. Ávila-Arcos"]
publication: "Science, **390**, _47-52_ (2025)."
categories: ["ancient DNA", "Mexico", "human migrations"]
url_source: https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.adt9651
url_preprint: 
url_pdf: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/395037266_Columbian_mammoth_mitogenomes_from_Mexico_uncover_the_species'_complex_evolutionary_history
journ: "Science"
volumen: 380
issue: 6645
page: "eadd6142"
year: 2023
pub_number: 7
image: "../cover/07_hispanic_science.png"
---
